name: list_organizations
description: List all organizations in your Clerk application. Organizations represent teams, companies, or groups within a multi-tenant application. Returns paginated results with organization details including name, slug, member count, and metadata. Use this to manage multi-tenant structures or display organization directories.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of organizations to return per page. Default is 10, maximum is 500.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of organizations to skip for pagination. Default is 0.

parameters.name: include_members_count
parameters.description: If true, include the count of members in each organization. Default is false.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search across organization names and slugs.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Sort field. Options: name, created_at, members_count. Prefix with + or - for ascending/descending. Default is -created_at.
